summary: Matched two stage functions: grOldPupupu_80211110 in groldpupupu.c and grRCruise_80201B60 in grrcruise.c. The PR also added required includes and updated the grRCruise_80201B60 header prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32). Bot report confirms both functions reached 100.00% and contributed +252 matched bytes.

key_files.role: Replaced stub marker for grOldPupupu_80211110 with a matched implementation and added gr/grmaterial.h include.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: groldpupupu.c include gr/grmaterial.h and grOldPupupu_80211110 implementation
text_corpus: bot report lists grOldPupupu_80211110 0.00% -> 100.00%, +124 bytes

key_files.role: Replaced stub marker for grRCruise_80201B60 with a matched implementation that iterates DObj siblings and toggles flag 1; added baselib dobj include.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grrcruise.c include sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.h and grRCruise_80201B60 implementation
text_corpus: bot report lists grRCruise_80201B60 0.00% -> 100.00%, +128 bytes

key_files.role: Updated grRCruise_80201B60 declaration from unknown return/params to recovered signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grRCruise_80201B60 prototype changed to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32)

what_changed.text: Implemented grOldPupupu_80211110(Ground_GObj* gobj), using Ground and HSD_JObj typed locals, calling grAnime_801C8138 with gp->map_id, clearing x10_flags.b2, applying grMaterial_801C8858(jobj, 0x28000000U), and setting gp->x11_flags.b012 to 2.
Implemented grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj* jobj, s32 arg1), retrieving the first DObj with HSD_JObjGetDObj, walking dobj->next, and clearing or setting flag 1 depending on arg1.
Added includes for gr/grmaterial.h and sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.h to support the new typed calls and DObj access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: include additions in groldpupupu.c and grrcruise.c

what_changed.text: Updated the public grrcruise.h prototype for grRCruise_80201B60 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to the recovered void(HSD_JObj*, s32) signature.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired a recovered function body with a header prototype update, avoiding a stale UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declaration for grRCruise_80201B60.

The matched implementations use existing typed APIs and fields such as HSD_JObjGetDObj, HSD_DObjClearFlags, HSD_DObjSetFlags, Ground->map_id, and Ground flag bitfields rather than raw pointer arithmetic.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For recovered functions with newly known signatures, update the owning header alongside the body when the declaration previously used UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grrcruise.h changes grRCruise_80201B60 to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Existing baselib helpers can express DObj list traversal and flag changes cleanly in stage code: start with HSD_JObjGetDObj(jobj), walk dobj->next, and use HSD_DObjClearFlags/HSD_DObjSetFlags for flag mutations.
Stage object setup code can often be made reviewable by naming clear local roles such as gp for Ground* and jobj for HSD_JObj* while using typed Ground flag fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldPupupu_80211110 uses Ground* gp, HSD_JObj* jobj, gp->map_id, x10_flags.b2, x11_flags.b012

naming_conventions.name: dobj, next
naming_conventions.meaning: DObj traversal locals for walking a linked DObj list.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_DObj* dobj; HSD_DObj* next; next = dobj->next

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK(16) in grOldPupupu_80211110 and PAD_STACK(8) in grRCruise_80201B60.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report confirms both functions at 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK is an explicit matching tactic; retain only with verifier evidence and keep scoped narrowly.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a natural while loop over the DObj linked list in grRCruise_80201B60.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The loop includes a redundant null check inside a loop already guarded by dobj != NULL; evidence shows this shape was part of the matched PR, but the slice does not explain whether alternate cleaner shapes were tried.

review_feedback.text: GALE01 report: matched code increased by +0.01%, +252 bytes, with 2 new matches. grRCruise_80201B60 reached 100.00% (+128 bytes) and grOldPupupu_80211110 reached 100.00% (+124 bytes).

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover header prototypes with matched function bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a matched function body proves a signature, update the owning header declaration in the same change rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS. PR #2270 demonstrates this for grRCruise_80201B60, with the C definition and grrcruise.h prototype both using void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32).

accepted_candidate_records.title: Scoped PAD_STACK in small matched stage functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2270 used narrow PAD_STACK calls in two newly matched stage functions, with the bot report showing both reached 100.00%. Treat this as a matching tactic with evidence, not a general style preference.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists both functions at 100.00%

rejection_notes: Do not infer a broad standard that redundant null checks inside loops should be preserved; the PR shows this matched one function but gives no rationale or alternate-shape evidence.
Do not promote PAD_STACK as normal decomp style; the loaded standards require explicit evidence and narrow scope.
Do not claim reviewer approval rationale; there were no loaded human reviews or review comments.
